title: Farewell, My Dear Cramer: First Touch
original_title: 映画 さよなら私のクラマー ファーストタッチ
overview: 14-year-old Nozomi Onda has only one thing on her mind: playing beautiful soccer. There's just one problem: no matter how much she longs to participate in official matches, she'd have physically superior boys as opponents. But when a boy from her past confronts her on the street, she decides she can't wait any longer.
